channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-31)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-03-31.

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] 8Dio|8Dio has released Catmosphere, a free library for Kontakt (full version) featuring all kind of feline noises.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Drums On Demand|Drums On Demand Easter Sale – up to 83% off on all drum sample packs ($10 each).?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 83% - Desarrollador: Drums On Demand - Finaliza: 2026-04-06

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Minimal Audio|Get 90% off Ripple Phaser by Minimal Audio for $4.90 (Normally $49).?NEW
[SAVE BIG] [HOT] United Plugins|Get 81% off Relooper by United Plugins. The discounted price is $15.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|W.A. Production 12th Anniversary Giveaway – W. A. Production has released the Free Anniversary Collection Vol. 12.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] A-Tom Soundware|Get Grafik7 7-band hybrid EQ from A-Tom Soundware for free. Features analog-style saturation and musical asymmetric Q.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: A-Tom Soundware - Finaliza: None
